channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: DiLoCo upends training bottlenecks: 12B-parameter runs across 4 U.S. regions, 20× faster than old syncs, with internet-scale bandwidth and mixed hardware. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/google-decoupled-diloco-distributed-ai #AI #DistributedComputing #TechNews
item.description: DiLoCo upends training bottlenecks: 12B-parameter runs across 4 U.S. regions, 20× faster than old syncs, with internet-scale bandwidth and mixed hardware. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/google-decoupled-diloco-distributed-ai #AI #DistributedComputing #TechNews

item.title: Zerion plugs UNI API, unlocking Uniswap v2–v4 liquidity across 18 chains for in-app swaps. Big boost, no external DEX step needed. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/zerion-wallet-uniswap-api-integration #DeFi #Web3 #Crypto
item.description: Zerion plugs UNI API, unlocking Uniswap v2–v4 liquidity across 18 chains for in-app swaps. Big boost, no external DEX step needed. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/zerion-wallet-uniswap-api-integration #DeFi #Web3 #Crypto

item.title: RT: Stablecoins bake real-time, 24/7 liquidity into banks, PSPs, and VASPs—without killing intermediaries. Credit where due: on-chain settlement meets traditional... https://Blockchain.News/news/stablecoins-reshape-financial-institutions #Stablecoins #FinanceTech #OnChain
